case_title: CORNEJO, MEDARDO vs. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: JURY WAIVED BY ALL PARTIES PER ORAL MOTION IN DEPT. #1.
